title: Rolson 42964 Single Cylinder Foot Pump
features: Steel framed foot pump with steel cylinder
Fitted with 480mm flexible hose and thumb lock lever tyre connector
Gauge graduated in PSI (range 0-100PSI) and Bar (0-7Bar)
description: From the manufacturer Overview Rolson Tools continually look to bring someone good innovative products, all at the good possible margins and there is no different. To date, we have over 250 good exciting and good products to whet someone's appetite, together with a host of good in store packaging and point of good material. All designed with impact and shelf appeal. About Us The Rolson marketing team have sought good ways to package our good and existing lines. We bring good product combinations which give a good impact.
